content: Self-Refine's single-perspective iterative feedback loop can be augmented by multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement framework that retains the original's no extra training advantage while boosting refinement quality. This framework would first generate varied conflicting drafts of an output from different perspectives, then run iterative self-feedback refinement on each inconsistent candidate to converge to a more robust final result.
